channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Amino Acid Injection (0338-0499-06)
item.description: PROSOL 20% SULFITE FREE IN PLASTIC CONTAINER, Injection, 2.76 g/100 mL; 1.96 g/100 mL; 600 mg/100 mL; 1.02 g/100 mL; 2.06 g/100 mL; 1.18 g/100 mL; 1.08 g/100 mL; 1.08 g/100 mL; 1.35 g/100 mL; 760 mg/100 mL; 1 g/100 mL; 1.34 g/100 mL; 1.02 g/100 mL; 980 mg/100 mL; 320 mg/100 mL; 50 mg/100 mL; 1.44 g/100 mL (NDC 0338-0499-06) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-16 Company: Baxter Healthcare
